_comment: Shared workspace configuration — Single Source of Truth for MCP, agents, and settings across all Loofi repos.

sequential-thinking.description: Step-by-step chain-of-thought reasoning for complex refactors and architecture

context7.description: Library documentation lookup for any framework or library

github.description: GitHub API (PRs, issues, repos, code search)
